text: vyhy bymy 'chshvrvsh hv' 'chshvrvsh hmlkh mhdv v'd-khvsh shb' v'shrym vm'h mdynh
bymym hhm khshbt  hmlkh 'chshvrvsh 'l khs' mlkhvtv 'shr bshvshn hbyrh
bshnt shlvsh lmlkhv 'shh mshth lkhl-shryv v'bdyv chyl  frs vmdy hfrtmym vshry hmdynvt lfnyv
bhr'tv 't-'shr khbvd mlkhvtv v't-yqr tf'rt gdvltv ymym rbym shmvnym vm't yvm
vbmlv't  hymym h'lh 'shh hmlkh lkhl-h'm hnmts'ym bshvshn hbyrh lmgdvl v'd-qtn mshth shb't ymym bchtsr gnt bytn hmlkh
chvr  khrfs vtkhlt 'chvz bchbly-bvts v'rgmn 'l-glyly khsf v'mvdy shsh mtvt  zhb vkhsf 'l rtsft bht-vshsh vdr vschrt
vhshqvt bkhly zhb vkhlym mkhlym shvnym vyyn mlkhvt rb khyd hmlkh
vhshtyh khdt 'yn 'ns khy-khn  ysd hmlkh 'l khl-rb bytv l'shvt khrtsvn 'ysh-v'ysh
gm vshty hmlkhh 'shth mshth nshym byt hmlkhvt 'shr lmlkh 'chshvrvsh    s
byvm hshby'y khtvb lb-hmlkh byyn 'mr lmhvmn bzt' chrbvn' bgt' v'bgt' ztr vkhrkhs shb't hsrysym hmshrtym 't-fny hmlkh 'chshvrvsh
lhby' 't-vshty hmlkhh lfny hmlkh bkhtr mlkhvt lhr'vt h'mym vhshrym 't-yfyh khy-tvbt mr'h hy'
vtm'n hmlkhh vshty lbv' bdbr hmlkh 'shr byd hsrysym vyqtsf hmlkh m'd vchmtv b'rh bv
vy'mr hmlkh lchkhmym yd'y h'tym khy-khn dbr hmlkh lfny khl-yd'y dt vdyn
vhqrb 'lyv  khrshn' shtr 'dmt' trshysh mrs mrsn' mmvkhn shb't shry  frs vmdy r'y fny hmlkh hyshbym r'shnh bmlkhvt
khdt mh-l'shvt bmlkhh vshty 'l  'shr l'-'shth 't-m'mr hmlkh 'chshvrvsh byd hsrysym    s
vy'mr [mvmkhn kh] (mmvkhn q) lfny hmlkh vhshrym l' 'l-hmlkh lbdv 'vth vshty hmlkhh khy 'l-khl-hshrym v'l-khl-h'mym 'shr bkhl-mdynvt hmlkh 'chshvrvsh
khy-yts' dbr-hmlkhh 'l-khl-hnshym lhbzvt b'lyhn b'ynyhn b'mrm hmlkh 'chshvrvsh 'mr lhby' 't-vshty hmlkhh lfnyv vl'-b'h
vhyvm hzh t'mrnh  shrvt frs-vmdy 'shr shm'v 't-dbr hmlkhh lkhl shry hmlkh vkhdy bzyvn vqtsf
'm-'l-hmlkh tvb yts' dbr-mlkhvt mlfnyv vykhtb bdty frs-vmdy vl' y'bvr 'shr l'-tbv' vshty lfny hmlkh 'chshvrvsh vmlkhvth ytn hmlkh lr'vth htvbh mmnh
vnshm' ftgm hmlkh 'shr-y'shh bkhl-mlkhvtv khy rbh hy' vkhl-hnshym ytnv yqr lb'lyhn lmgdvl v'd-qtn
vyytb hdbr b'yny hmlkh vhshrym vy'sh hmlkh khdbr mmvkhn
vyshlch sfrym 'l-khl-mdynvt hmlkh 'l-mdynh vmdynh khkhtbh v'l-'m v'm khlshvnv lhyvt khl-'ysh shrr bbytv vmdbr khlshvn 'mv  f
'chr hdbrym h'lh khshkh chmt hmlkh 'chshvrvsh zkhr 't-vshty v't 'shr-'shth v't 'shr-ngzr 'lyh
vy'mrv n'ry-hmlkh mshrtyv ybqshv lmlkh n'rvt btvlvt tvbvt mr'h
vyfqd hmlkh fqydym bkhl-mdynvt mlkhvtv vyqbtsv 't-khl-n'rh-btvlh tvbt mr'h 'l-shvshn hbyrh 'l-byt hnshym 'l-yd hg' srys hmlkh shmr hnshym vntvn tmrvqyhn
vhn'rh 'shr tytb b'yny hmlkh tmlkh tcht vshty vyytb hdbr b'yny hmlkh vy'sh khn    s
'ysh yhvdy hyh bshvshn hbyrh vshmv mrdkhy bn y'yr bn-shm'y bn-qysh 'ysh ymyny
'shr hglh myrvshlym 'm-hglh 'shr hglth 'm ykhnyh mlkh-yhvdh 'shr hglh nbvkhdn'tsr mlkh bbl
vyhy 'mn 't-hdsh hy' 'str bt-ddv khy 'yn lh 'b v'm vhn'rh yft-t'r vtvbt mr'h vbmvt 'byh v'mh lqchh mrdkhy lv lbt
vyhy bhshm' dbr-hmlkh vdtv vbhqbts n'rvt rbvt 'l-shvshn hbyrh 'l-yd hgy vtlqch 'str 'l-byt hmlkh 'l-yd hgy shmr hnshym
vtytb hn'rh b'ynyv vtsh' chsd lfnyv vybhl 't-tmrvqyh v't-mnvth ltt lh v't shb' hn'rvt hr'yvt ltt-lh mbyt hmlkh vyshnh v't-n'rvtyh ltvb byt hnshym
l'-hgydh 'str 't-'mh v't-mvldth khy mrdkhy tsvh 'lyh 'shr l'-tgyd
vbkhl-yvm vyvm mrdkhy mthlkh lfny chtsr byt-hnshym ld't 't-shlvm 'str vmh-y'shh bh
vbhgy' tr n'rh vn'rh lbv'  'l-hmlkh 'chshvrvsh mqts hyvt lh khdt hnshym shnym 'shr chdsh khy khn yml'v ymy mrvqyhn shshh chdshym bshmn hmr vshshh chdshym bbshmym vbtmrvqy hnshym
vbzh hn'rh b'h 'l-hmlkh 't khl-'shr t'mr yntn lh lbv' 'mh mbyt hnshym 'd-byt hmlkh
b'rb  hy' b'h vbbqr hy' shbh 'l-byt hnshym shny 'l-yd sh'shgz srys hmlkh shmr hfylgshym l'-tbv' 'vd 'l-hmlkh khy 'm-chfts bh hmlkh vnqr'h bshm
vbhgy' tr-'str bt-'bychyl dd mrdkhy 'shr lqch-lv lbt lbv' 'l-hmlkh l' bqshh dbr khy 'm 't-'shr y'mr hgy srys-hmlkh shmr hnshym vthy 'str nsh't chn b'yny khl-r'yh
vtlqch 'str 'l-hmlkh 'chshvrvsh 'l-byt mlkhvtv bchdsh h'shyry hv'-chdsh tbt bshnt-shb' lmlkhvtv
vy'hb hmlkh 't-'str mkhl-hnshym vtsh'-chn vchsd lfnyv mkhl-hbtvlt vyshm khtr-mlkhvt br'shh vymlykhh tcht vshty
vy'sh hmlkh mshth gdvl lkhl-shryv v'bdyv 't mshth 'str vhnchh lmdynvt 'shh vytn msh't khyd hmlkh
vbhqbts btvlvt shnyt vmrdkhy yshb bsh'r-hmlkh
'yn 'str mgdt mvldth v't-'mh kh'shr tsvh 'lyh mrdkhy v't-m'mr mrdkhy 'str 'shh kh'shr hyth b'mnh 'tv    s
bymym hhm vmrdkhy yshb bsh'r-hmlkh qtsf bgtn vtrsh shny-srysy hmlkh mshmry hsf vybqshv lshlch yd bmlkh 'chshvrsh
vyvd' hdbr lmrdkhy vygd l'str hmlkhh vt'mr 'str lmlkh bshm mrdkhy
vybqsh hdbr vymts' vytlv shnyhm 'l-'ts vykhtb bsfr dbry hymym lfny hmlkh  f
'chr  hdbrym h'lh gdl hmlkh 'chshvrvsh 't-hmn bn-hmdt' h'ggy vynsh'hv vyshm 't-khs'v m'l khl-hshrym 'shr 'tv
vkhl-'bdy hmlkh 'shr-bsh'r hmlkh khr'ym vmshtchvym lhmn khy-khn tsvh-lv hmlkh vmrdkhy l' ykhr' vl' yshtchvh
vy'mrv 'bdy hmlkh 'shr-bsh'r hmlkh lmrdkhy mdv' 'th 'vbr 't mtsvt hmlkh
vyhy [b'mrm kh] (kh'mrm q) 'lyv yvm vyvm vl' shm' 'lyhm vygydv lhmn lr'vt hy'mdv dbry mrdkhy khy-hgyd lhm 'shr-hv' yhvdy
vyr' hmn khy-'yn mrdkhy khr' vmshtchvh lv vyml' hmn chmh
vybz b'ynyv lshlch yd bmrdkhy lbdv khy-hgydv lv 't-'m mrdkhy vybqsh hmn lhshmyd 't-khl-hyhvdym 'shr bkhl-mlkhvt 'chshvrvsh 'm mrdkhy
bchdsh hr'shvn hv'-chdsh nysn bshnt shtym 'shrh lmlkh 'chshvrvsh hfyl fvr hv' hgvrl lfny hmn myvm  lyvm vmchdsh lchdsh shnym-'shr hv'-chdsh 'dr    s
vy'mr hmn lmlkh 'chshvrvsh yshnv 'm-'chd mfzr vmfrd byn h'mym bkhl mdynvt mlkhvtkh vdtyhm shnvt mkhl-'m v't-dty hmlkh 'ynm 'shym vlmlkh 'yn-shvh lhnychm
'm-'l-hmlkh tvb ykhtb l'bdm v'shrt 'lfym khkhr-khsf 'shqvl 'l-ydy 'shy hml'khh lhby' 'l-gnzy hmlkh
vysr hmlkh 't-tb'tv m'l ydv vytnh lhmn bn-hmdt' h'ggy tsrr hyhvdym
vy'mr hmlkh lhmn hkhsf ntvn lkh vh'm l'shvt bv khtvb b'ynykh

vyqr'v sfry hmlkh bchdsh hr'shvn bshlvshh 'shr yvm bv vykhtb khkhl-'shr-tsvh hmn 'l 'chshdrfny-hmlkh v'l-hfchvt 'shr  'l-mdynh vmdynh v'l-shry 'm v'm mdynh vmdynh khkhtbh v'm v'm khlshvnv bshm hmlkh 'chshvrsh nkhtb vnchtm btb't hmlkh
vnshlvch sfrym byd hrtsym 'l-khl-mdynvt hmlkh lhshmyd lhrg vl'bd 't-khl-hyhvdym mn'r v'd-zqn tf vnshym byvm 'chd bshlvshh 'shr lchdsh shnym-'shr hv'-chdsh 'dr vshllm lbvz
ftshgn hkhtb lhntn dt bkhl-mdynh vmdynh glvy lkhl-h'mym lhyvt 'tdym lyvm hzh
hrtsym yts'v dchvfym bdbr hmlkh vhdt ntnh bshvshn hbyrh vhmlkh vhmn yshbv lshtvt vh'yr shvshn nbvkhh  f
vmrdkhy yd' 't-khl-'shr n'shh vyqr' mrdkhy 't-bgdyv vylbsh shq v'fr vyts' btvkh h'yr vyz'q z'qh gdlh vmrh
vybv' 'd lfny sh'r-hmlkh khy 'yn lbv' 'l-sh'r hmlkh blbvsh shq
vbkhl-mdynh vmdynh mqvm 'shr dbr-hmlkh vdtv mgy' 'bl gdvl lyhvdym vtsvm vbkhy vmsfd shq v'fr yts' lrbym
[vtbv'ynh kh] (vtbv'nh  q) n'rvt 'str vsrysyh vygydv lh vttchlchl hmlkhh m'd vtshlch bgdym lhlbysh 't-mrdkhy vlhsyr shqv m'lyv vl' qbl
vtqr' 'str lhtkh msrysy hmlkh 'shr h'myd lfnyh vttsvhv 'l-mrdkhy ld't mh-zh v'l-mh-zh
vyts' htkh 'l-mrdkhy 'l-rchvb h'yr 'shr lfny sh'r-hmlkh
vygd-lv mrdkhy 't khl-'shr qrhv v't  frsht hkhsf 'shr 'mr hmn lshqvl 'l-gnzy hmlkh [byhvdyym kh] (byhvdym  q) l'bdm
v't-ftshgn khtb-hdt 'shr-ntn bshvshn lhshmydm ntn lv lhr'vt 't-'str vlhgyd lh vltsvvt 'lyh lbv' 'l-hmlkh lhtchnn-lv vlbqsh mlfnyv 'l-'mh
vybv' htkh vygd l'str 't dbry mrdkhy
vt'mr 'str lhtkh vttsvhv 'l-mrdkhy

khl-'bdy hmlkh v'm-mdynvt hmlkh yvd'ym 'shr khl-'ysh v'shh 'shr ybv'-'l-hmlkh 'l-hchtsr hfnymyt 'shr l'-yqr' 'cht dtv lhmyt lbd m'shr yvshyt-lv hmlkh 't-shrbyt hzhb vchyh v'ny l' nqr'ty lbv' 'l-hmlkh zh shlvshym yvm
vygydv lmrdkhy 't dbry 'str  f
vy'mr mrdkhy lhshyb 'l-'str 'l-tdmy bnfshkh lhmlt byt-hmlkh mkhl-hyhvdym
khy 'm-hchrsh tchryshy b't hz't rvch vhtslh y'mvd lyhvdym mmqvm 'chr v't vbyt-'bykh t'bdv vmy yvd' 'm-l't khz't hg't lmlkhvt
vt'mr 'str lhshyb 'l-mrdkhy
lkh khnvs 't-khl-hyhvdym hnmts'ym bshvshn vtsvmv 'ly v'l-t'khlv v'l-tshtv shlsht ymym lylh vyvm gm-'ny vn'rty 'tsvm khn vbkhn 'bv' 'l-hmlkh 'shr l'-khdt vkh'shr 'bdty 'bdty
vy'br mrdkhy vy'sh khkhl 'shr-tsvth 'lyv 'str    s
vyhy  byvm hshlyshy vtlbsh 'str mlkhvt vt'md bchtsr byt-hmlkh hfnymyt nkhch byt hmlkh vhmlkh yvshb 'l-khs' mlkhvtv bbyt hmlkhvt nkhch ftch hbyt
vyhy khr'vt hmlkh 't-'str hmlkhh 'mdt bchtsr nsh'h chn b'ynyv vyvsht hmlkh l'str 't-shrbyt hzhb 'shr bydv vtqrb 'str vtg' br'sh hshrbyt    s
vy'mr lh hmlkh mh-lkh 'str hmlkhh vmh-bqshtkh 'd-chtsy hmlkhvt vyntn lkh
vt'mr 'str 'm-'l-hmlkh tvb ybv' hmlkh vhmn hyvm 'l-hmshth 'shr-'shyty lv
vy'mr hmlkh mhrv 't-hmn l'shvt 't-dbr 'str vyb' hmlkh vhmn 'l-hmshth 'shr-'shth 'str
vy'mr hmlkh l'str bmshth hyyn mh-sh'ltkh vyntn lkh vmh-bqshtkh 'd-chtsy hmlkhvt vt'sh
vt'n 'str vt'mr sh'lty vbqshty
'm-mts'ty chn b'yny hmlkh v'm-'l-hmlkh tvb ltt 't-sh'lty vl'shvt 't-bqshty ybv' hmlkh vhmn 'l-hmshth 'shr ''shh lhm vmchr ''shh khdbr hmlkh
vyts' hmn byvm hhv' shmch vtvb lb vkhr'vt hmn 't-mrdkhy bsh'r hmlkh vl'-qm vl'-z' mmnv vyml' hmn 'l-mrdkhy chmh
vyt'fq hmn vybv' 'l-bytv vyshlch vyb' 't-'hbyv v't-zrsh 'shtv
vysfr lhm hmn 't-khbvd 'shrv vrb bnyv v't khl-'shr gdlv hmlkh v't 'shr nsh'v 'l-hshrym v'bdy hmlkh
vy'mr hmn 'f l'-hby'h 'str hmlkhh 'm-hmlkh 'l-hmshth 'shr-'shth khy 'm-'vty vgm-lmchr 'ny qrv'-lh 'm-hmlkh
vkhl-zh 'ynnv shvh ly bkhl-'t 'shr 'ny r'h 't-mrdkhy hyhvdy yvshb bsh'r hmlkh
vt'mr lv zrsh 'shtv vkhl-'hbyv y'shv-'ts gbh chmshym 'mh vbbqr  'mr lmlkh vytlv 't-mrdkhy 'lyv vb'-'m-hmlkh 'l-hmshth shmch vyytb hdbr lfny hmn vy'sh h'ts  f
blylh hhv' nddh shnt hmlkh vy'mr lhby' 't-sfr hzkhrnvt dbry hymym vyhyv nqr'ym lfny hmlkh
vymts' khtvb 'shr hgyd mrdkhy 'l-bgtn' vtrsh shny srysy hmlkh mshmry hsf 'shr bqshv lshlch yd bmlkh 'chshvrvsh
vy'mr hmlkh mh-n'shh yqr vgdvlh lmrdkhy 'l-zh vy'mrv n'ry hmlkh mshrtyv l'-n'shh 'mv dbr
vy'mr hmlkh my bchtsr vhmn b' lchtsr byt-hmlkh hchytsvnh l'mr lmlkh ltlvt 't-mrdkhy 'l-h'ts 'shr-hkhyn lv
vy'mrv n'ry hmlkh 'lyv hnh hmn 'md bchtsr vy'mr hmlkh ybv'
vybv' hmn vy'mr lv hmlkh mh-l'shvt b'ysh 'shr hmlkh chfts byqrv vy'mr hmn blbv lmy ychfts hmlkh l'shvt yqr yvtr mmny
vy'mr hmn 'l-hmlkh 'ysh 'shr hmlkh chfts byqrv
yby'v lbvsh mlkhvt 'shr lbsh-bv hmlkh vsvs 'shr rkhb 'lyv hmlkh v'shr ntn khtr mlkhvt br'shv
vntvn hlbvsh vhsvs 'l-yd-'ysh mshry hmlkh hfrtmym vhlbyshv 't-h'ysh 'shr hmlkh chfts byqrv vhrkhybhv 'l-hsvs brchvb h'yr vqr'v lfnyv khkhh y'shh l'ysh 'shr hmlkh chfts byqrv
vy'mr hmlkh lhmn mhr qch 't-hlbvsh v't-hsvs kh'shr dbrt v'shh-khn lmrdkhy hyhvdy hyvshb bsh'r hmlkh 'l-tfl dbr mkhl 'shr dbrt
vyqch hmn 't-hlbvsh v't-hsvs vylbsh 't-mrdkhy vyrkhybhv brchvb h'yr vyqr' lfnyv khkhh y'shh l'ysh 'shr hmlkh chfts byqrv
vyshb mrdkhy 'l-sh'r hmlkh vhmn ndchf 'l-bytv 'bl vchfvy r'sh
vysfr hmn lzrsh 'shtv vlkhl-'hbyv 't khl-'shr qrhv vy'mrv  lv chkhmyv vzrsh 'shtv 'm mzr' hyhvdym mrdkhy 'shr hchlvt lnfl lfnyv l'-tvkhl lv khy-nfvl tfvl lfnyv
'vdm mdbrym 'mv vsrysy hmlkh hgy'v vybhlv lhby' 't-hmn 'l-hmshth 'shr-'shth 'str
vyb' hmlkh vhmn lshtvt 'm-'str hmlkhh
vy'mr hmlkh l'str gm byvm hshny bmshth hyyn mh-sh'ltkh 'str hmlkhh vtntn lkh vmh-bqshtkh 'd-chtsy hmlkhvt vt'sh
vt'n 'str hmlkhh vt'mr 'm-mts'ty chn b'ynykh hmlkh v'm-'l-hmlkh tvb tntn-ly nfshy bsh'lty v'my bbqshty
khy nmkhrnv 'ny v'my lhshmyd lhrvg vl'bd v'lv l'bdym vlshfchvt nmkhrnv hchrshty khy 'yn htsr shvh bnzq hmlkh    s
vy'mr hmlkh 'chshvrvsh vy'mr l'str hmlkhh my hv' zh v'y-zh hv' 'shr-ml'v lbv l'shvt khn
vt'mr-'str 'ysh tsr v'vyb hmn  hr' hzh vhmn nb't mlfny hmlkh vhmlkhh
vhmlkh qm bchmtv mmshth hyyn 'l-gnt hbytn vhmn 'md lbqsh 'l-nfshv m'str hmlkhh khy r'h khy-khlth 'lyv hr'h m't hmlkh
vhmlkh shb mgnt hbytn 'l-byt  mshth hyyn vhmn nfl 'l-hmth 'shr 'str 'lyh vy'mr hmlkh hgm lkhbvsh 't-hmlkhh 'my bbyt hdbr yts' mfy hmlkh vfny hmn chfv    s
vy'mr chrbvnh 'chd mn-hsrysym lfny hmlkh gm hnh-h'ts 'shr-'shh hmn lmrdkhy 'shr dbr-tvb 'l-hmlkh 'md bbyt hmn gbh chmshym 'mh vy'mr hmlkh tlhv 'lyv
vytlv 't-hmn 'l-h'ts 'shr-hkhyn lmrdkhy vchmt hmlkh shkhkhh  f
byvm hhv' ntn hmlkh 'chshvrvsh l'str hmlkhh 't-byt hmn tsrr [hyhvdyym kh] (hyhvdym q) vmrdkhy b' lfny hmlkh khy-hgydh 'str mh hv'-lh
vysr hmlkh 't-tb'tv 'shr h'byr mhmn vytnh lmrdkhy vtshm 'str 't-mrdkhy 'l-byt hmn  f
vtvsf 'str vtdbr lfny hmlkh vtfl lfny rglyv vtbkh vttchnn-lv lh'byr 't-r't hmn h'ggy v't mchshbtv 'shr chshb 'l-hyhvdym
vyvsht hmlkh l'str 't shrbt hzhb vtqm 'str vt'md lfny hmlkh
vt'mr 'm-'l-hmlkh tvb v'm-mts'ty chn lfnyv vkhshr hdbr lfny hmlkh vtvbh 'ny b'ynyv ykhtb lhshyb 't-hsfrym mchshbt hmn bn-hmdt' h'ggy 'shr khtb l'bd 't-hyhvdym 'shr bkhl-mdynvt hmlkh
khy 'ykhkhh 'vkhl vr'yty br'h 'shr-ymts' 't-'my v'ykhkhh 'vkhl vr'yty b'bdn mvldty    s
vy'mr hmlkh 'chshvrsh l'str hmlkhh vlmrdkhy hyhvdy hnh byt-hmn ntty l'str v'tv tlv 'l-h'ts 'l 'shr-shlch ydv [byhvdyym kh] (byhvdym q)
v'tm khtbv 'l-hyhvdym khtvb b'ynykhm bshm hmlkh vchtmv btb't hmlkh khy-khtb 'shr-nkhtb bshm-hmlkh vnchtvm btb't hmlkh 'yn lhshyb

vyqr'v sfry-hmlkh b't-hhy' bchdsh hshlyshy hv'-chdsh syvn bshlvshh v'shrym bv vykhtb khkhl-'shr-tsvh mrdkhy 'l-hyhvdym v'l h'chshdrfnym-vhfchvt vshry hmdynvt 'shr  mhdv v'd-khvsh shb' v'shrym vm'h mdynh mdynh vmdynh khkhtbh v'm v'm khlshnv v'l-hyhvdym khkhtbm vkhlshvnm
vykhtb bshm hmlkh 'chshvrsh vychtm btb't hmlkh vyshlch sfrym byd hrtsym bsvsym rkhby hrkhsh h'chshtrnym bny hrmkhym
'shr ntn hmlkh lyhvdym  'shr bkhl-'yr-v'yr lhqhl vl'md 'l-nfshm lhshmyd vlhrg vl'bd 't-khl-chyl 'm vmdynh htsrym 'tm tf vnshym vshllm lbvz
byvm 'chd bkhl-mdynvt hmlkh 'chshvrvsh bshlvshh 'shr lchdsh shnym-'shr hv'-chdsh 'dr
ftshgn hkhtb lhntn dt bkhl-mdynh vmdynh glvy lkhl-h'mym vlhyvt [hyhvdyym kh] (hyhvdym q) ['tvdym kh] ('tydym q) lyvm hzh lhnqm m'ybyhm
hrtsym rkhby hrkhsh h'chshtrnym yts'v mbhlym vdchvfym bdbr hmlkh vhdt ntnh bshvshn hbyrh  f
vmrdkhy yts'  mlfny hmlkh blbvsh mlkhvt tkhlt vchvr v'trt zhb gdvlh vtkhrykh bvts v'rgmn vh'yr shvshn tshlh vshmchh
lyhvdym hyth 'vrh vshmchh vshshn vyqr
vbkhl-mdynh vmdynh vbkhl-'yr v'yr mqvm 'shr dbr-hmlkh vdtv mgy' shmchh vshshvn lyhvdym mshth vyvm tvb vrbym m'my h'rts mtyhdym khy-nfl fchd-hyhvdym 'lyhm
vbshnym 'shr chdsh hv'-chdsh 'dr bshlvshh 'shr yvm bv 'shr hgy' dbr-hmlkh vdtv lh'shvt byvm 'shr shbrv 'yby hyhvdym lshlvt bhm vnhfvkh hv' 'shr yshltv hyhvdym hmh bshn'yhm
nqhlv hyhvdym b'ryhm bkhl-mdynvt hmlkh 'chshvrvsh lshlch yd bmbqshy r'tm v'ysh l'-'md lfnyhm khy-nfl fchdm 'l-khl-h'mym
vkhl-shry hmdynvt vh'chshdrfnym vhfchvt v'shy hml'khh 'shr lmlkh mnsh'ym 't-hyhvdym khy-nfl fchd-mrdkhy 'lyhm
khy-gdvl mrdkhy bbyt hmlkh vshm'v hvlkh bkhl-hmdynvt khy-h'ysh mrdkhy hvlkh vgdvl  f
